name: get_directions
description: Calculates turn-by-turn directions between two locations with support for driving, walking, cycling, and transit.

origin.description: Starting address, landmark, or coordinates in 'lat,lon' format.

destination.description: Destination address, landmark, or coordinates in 'lat,lon' format.

avoid.description: Optional list of route features to avoid.

departure_time.description: Planned departure time (ISO 8601). Used for transit schedules and traffic estimation.
